Acid Absorption.name: 酸液吸收 Acid Absorption
Acid Absorption.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}拥有在强酸环境中茁壮生存的非凡能力。其强酸抗性加倍；若该抗性会将伤害量降至零以下，则负数部分改为作为治疗获得。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within acidic environments. Its Acid resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Acid Spit.name: 酸液喷吐 Acid Spit
Acid Spit.description:
该生物有会分泌腐蚀性强酸的唾液腺。

The creature has salivary glands which produce a caustic acid.

acidSpit.name: 酸液喷吐 Acid Spit
acidSpit.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}向 20 英尺内的一个目标吐出一团酸性胆汁。

在严重命中时，此次攻击会造成 @Condition[corroding] 状态，持续3 回合。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} spits a glob of acidic bile at a target within 20 feet.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

Acid Spray.name: 酸液喷射 Acid Spray
Acid Spray.description:
该生物有能分泌腐蚀性酸液喷雾的唾液腺。

The creature has salivary glands which produce a caustic acidic spray.

acidSpray.name: 酸液喷射 Acid Spray
acidSpray.description:
该生物喷出一股酸性胆汁，形成一个10尺锥形范围。

在重击时，此攻击会造成 @Condition[corroding] 状况，持续3回合。

The creature expels a spray of acidic bile in a 10 foot fan.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

Amorphous.name: 无定形 Amorphous
Amorphous.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}可以穿过直径仅为1英寸的狭窄空间，且其跨步不会受到任何惩罚。它获得等同于其坚韧属性值一半的闪避加值，并免疫@Condition[restrained]状态。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} may move through a space as narrow as 1 inch in diameter without any penalty to its Stride. It gains a bonus to Dodge equal to half its Toughness score and is immune to the @Condition[restrained] condition.

Aqueous Transmission.name: 水相传导 Aqueous Transmission
Aqueous Transmission.description:
该@ref[name]能够通过水瞬间移动。

The @ref[name] is able to move instantaneously through water.

aqueousTransmission.name: 水相传导 Aqueous Transmission
aqueousTransmission.description:
当该@ref[name]位于水中时，它可以瞬间将自己传送到同一片水体内120英尺内的任何未被占据的空间。它无需能够看见目的地即可进行这次移动。

When the @ref[name] is within water, it can instantaneously transport itself to any unoccupied space within the same body of water up to 120 feet away. It does not need to be able to see the destination to make this Move.

Bestial Senses.name: 野兽感知 Bestial Senses
Bestial Senses.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}拥有高度磨炼的感知，对其所处环境尤为敏锐，所有察觉检定获得+2恩惠。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has finely honed senses and is particularly perceptive of their environment, all Awareness checks gain +2 Boons.

Blood Sense.name: 血之感知 Blood Sense
Blood Sense.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}能够精确感知20尺内任何未处于满生命值状态的有血生物。对受伤生物进行的任何武器或技能攻击，不会承受若该生物处于@Condition[blinded]时通常会适用的祸骰。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can precisely sense any blooded creature within 20 feet which does not have all its hit points. Any weapon or skill attack against a wounded creature does not suffer Banes that would normally apply if the creature were @Condition[blinded].

Bonded Mind.name: 心灵联结 Bonded Mind
Bonded Mind.description:
拥有此天赋的@ref[actor.name]{生物}的心智与其群体中的其他成员密不可分地束缚在一起。它能够与60英尺内任何其他@ref[actor.taxonomy.name]{同分类法生物}进行即时的心灵感应沟通。

The mind of a @ref[actor.name]{creature} with this talent is inextricably bound to other members of its group. It is capable of instantaneous telepathic communication with any other @ref[actor.taxonomy.name]{creature of its taxonomy} within 60 feet.

Burrower.name: 掘穴者 Burrower
Burrower.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}拥有一种超自然能力，能够快速掘穿并非完全不可渗透的坚固表面。

此外，它还能压缩自己的身体，从可容纳其体型¼的孔隙中通过。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a supernatural ability to rapidly burrow through solid surfaces which are not entirely impermeable.

Additionally, it can compress its body to pass through apertures that can accommodate ¼ of its Size.

explosiveEmergence.name: 爆炸现身 Explosive Emergence
explosiveEmergence.description:
@ref[actor.name]{生物}以惊人而突然的力量从地下位置现身。该动作只能在该生物离开@Condition[burrowing]状态后立即发动。

@ref[actor.name]{生物}破土而出，对其武器射程内的所有敌人进行一次强化的打击。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} emerges from a subterranean position with surprising and sudden force. This action may only be activated immediately the creature leaves the @Condition[burrowing] state.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} erupts to Strike against all enemies within its weapon range with an Empowered attack.

Clinging Grip.name: 黏附之握 Clinging Grip
Clinging Grip.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}能够凭借非凡的抓握力或附着力攀附在垂直或头顶的表面上。只要该生物邻接任何能够合理支撑其身体的坚固表面，它就可以避免坠落。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to cling to vertical or overhead surfaces with exceptional grip or adhesion. This creature can avoid falling as long as they are adjacent to any solid surface which can reasonably support them.

droppingStrike.name: 坠落打击 Dropping Strike
droppingStrike.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{生物} 可以从上方坠下，对下方的一个生物进行打击。目标生物承受一次强化攻击；若攻击成功，除造成伤害外，还会使其 @Condition[prone]。

The @ref[actor.name]{生物} 只有在未命中目标时，才会因这次攻击承受坠落伤害。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can drop from overhead to Strike a creature below it. The target creature suffers an Empowered attack which, if successful, knocks them @Condition[prone] in addition to dealing damage.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can suffer falling damage from this attack only if it misses its target.

Cold Absorption.name: 寒冷吸收 Cold Absorption
Cold Absorption.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}具备在严寒环境中茁壮生存的非凡能力。其Cold抗性加倍，且如果该抗性会将伤害量降至零以下，则该负值改为作为治疗获得。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within frigid environments. Its Cold resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Corrode Weapon.name: 腐蚀武器 Corrode Weapon
Corrode Weapon.description:
@ref[actor.name]{软泥怪}体内具有腐蚀性的代谢会威胁到打击它的金属武器，使其溶解。

The internal corrosive metabolism of the @ref[actor.name]{ooze} threatens to dissolve metal weapons that strike it.

oozeCorrodeWeapon.name: 腐蚀武器 Corrode Weapon
oozeCorrodeWeapon.description:
当被金属制成的近战武器击中时，软泥怪会试图吞噬该武器本身，并可能将其破坏。

此次攻击为无害，但若成功，用于此次攻击的武器的品质会降低一个等级。若获得严重成功，或该武器已是粗制滥造，则该武器会完全破碎。附魔武器不受此效果影响。

When struck by a melee weapon made of metal, the ooze attempts to consume the weapon itself, potentially breaking it.

This attack is Harmless, but if successful the Quality of the weapon used in the attack is downgraded by one tier. On a Critical Success or if the weapon is already Shoddy, the weapon becomes entirely Broken. Enchanted weapons are protected against this effect.
oozeCorrodeWeapon.condition:
被金属制武器近战击中。
Struck in melee by a weapon made of metal.

Corruption Absorption.name: 腐化吸收 Corruption Absorption
Corruption Absorption.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}拥有一种卓越的能力，能够摆脱死亡魔法的效果。其腐化抗性加倍；如果该抗性会将伤害量降至零以下，则该负数值改为作为治疗获得。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to shrug off the effects of Death magic. Its Corruption resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Electricity Absorption.name: 电能吸收 Electricity Absorption
Electricity Absorption.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}具有出众的能力，能够从容承受闪电冲击。其电击抗性翻倍；如果该抗性会使伤害量降到零以下，则超出的负数部分改为作为治疗承受。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to take lightning blasts in stride. Its Electricity resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Elusive Flight.name: 飘忽飞行 Elusive Flight
Elusive Flight.description:
这个@ref[actor.name]{生物}在飞行时尤其难以捉摸，能够猛扑进出战斗而不会引发任何脱离接战。如果它降落到地面上，就可以被接战；若它试图重新飞行，则可能会适用脱离接战。

This @ref[actor.name]{creature} is especially elusive while in flight, able to swoop in and out of combat without provoking any Disengagement. It can be engaged if it lands upon the ground and Disengagement may apply if it attempts to return to flight.

Extended Breath.name: 延长呼吸 Extended Breath
Extended Breath.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}可以屏住呼吸15分钟。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can hold its breath for 15 minutes.

False Appearance.name: 伪装外表 False Appearance
False Appearance.description:
当其保持静止不动时，@ref[actor.name]{生物}与某个其他物体或材料无法区分。

While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

Fire Absorption.name: 火焰吸收 Fire Absorption
Fire Absorption.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}拥有在灼热环境中茁壮生存的卓越能力。其火元素抗性加倍，且如果该抗性会使伤害值降低至零以下，则该负值改为作为治疗受到。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within scorching environments. Its Fire resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Glider.name: 滑翔者 Glider
Glider.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}在下落时可以控制其移动，并且每下落20英尺，最多可以执行一次距离不超过其步幅的移动动作。

如果它以这种方式花费动作来移动，则在落地时不会受到坠落伤害。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can control its movement while falling and may perform the Move action up to a maximum distance of its Stride for each 20 feet that it falls.

If it spends Action to Move in this way, it does not suffer falling damage upon landing.

Gloom Sight.name: 幽暗视觉 Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}可以凝视完全黑暗中的幽暗，并正常视物。魔法黑暗不会妨碍该生物的视觉。

系统开发：此特性需要自动化，以配置不受魔法黑暗影响的视觉与侦测模式。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

Glowing Body.name: 发光的身体 Glowing Body
Glowing Body.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}在15英尺半径内发出非魔法的明亮光照，并在30英尺半径内发出微光。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} emits non-magical bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light in a 30 foot radius.

Grave Mark.name: 墓之印记 Grave Mark
Grave Mark.description:
当@ref[actor.name]{生物}用一次近战攻击造成重击时，它会在目标身上留下一个不祥的墓之印记。

When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} achieves a Critical Hit with a melee attack, it leaves a baleful Grave Mark upon its target.

graveMark.name: 墓之印记 Grave Mark
graveMark.description:
在以一次近战攻击取得暴击后，@ref[actor.name]{生物}会攻击目标的意志防御；若成功，则会施加一个墓之印记，并使目标陷入@Condition[exhausted]状态，且该状态会持续，直到目标完成一次休息。

如果一个带有墓之印记的人型生物在印记效果持续期间死亡，它会在其后的下一个回合自死亡中复起，成为一只@UUID[Compendium.crucible.taxonomy.Item.ghoul00000000000]{食尸鬼}。

After achieving a Critical Hit with a melee attack, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks the target's Willpower defense, leaving a Grave Mark upon a success that inflicts the @Condition[exhausted] condition that persists until the target completes a Rest.

If a humanoid creature bearing a Grave Mark dies while under the effects of the mark, it rises from death on its subsequent Turn as a @UUID[Compendium.crucible.taxonomy.Item.ghoul00000000000]{Ghoul}.
graveMark.condition:
当以近战攻击造成重击时。
When achieving a Critical Hit with a melee attack.

Horrific Critical.name: 骇人重创 Horrific Critical
Horrific Critical.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}施以野蛮而 grotesque 的打击，引发任何目睹者内心的恐惧。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} delivers savage and grotesque blows that evoke fear within any who behold them.

horrificCritical.name: 骇人重创 Horrific Critical
horrificCritical.description:
当 @ref[actor.name]{生物} 使用一次近战攻击造成一次重击时，它可以夸大这一击的声势，以一种会在目睹这次打击者心中引发恐惧的方式挥出这一击。

30尺内所有能够看见该生物的敌人，都必须承受一次针对其意志的无害攻击，否则将陷入 @Condition[frightened]，持续3 回合。

When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} achieves a Critical Hit using a melee attack it may exaggerate the blow in a way that evokes fear within those who behold the strike.

All the enemies within 30 feet who can see the creature face a Harmless attack against their Willpower or become @Condition[frightened] for 3 Turns.
horrificCritical.condition:
在该生物以一次近战攻击取得重击后，立即生效。
Immediately after the creature achieves a Critical Hit with a melee attack.

Immutable Form.name: 不变形态 Immutable Form
Immutable Form.description:
@ref[actor.name]免疫任何会改变其物理形态的法术或效果。

The @ref[actor.name] is immune to any spell or effect which alters its physical form.

Lightning Spit.name: 闪电喷吐 Lightning Spit
Lightning Spit.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}能够产生并释放轻微的电流放电。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to produce and expel minor voltaic discharge.

lightningSpit.name: 闪电喷吐 Lightning Spit
lightningSpit.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}向20尺内的一个目标生物吐出一道小型闪电箭，攻击其反射，并造成电击伤害。

在重击时，此次攻击会施加@Condition[shocked]状态，持续3回合。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} spits a small bolt of lightning at a target creature within 20 feet, attacking its Reflex and dealing Electricity damage.

On a Critical Hit the attack causes the @Condition[shocked] condition for 3 Turns.

Lightning Spray.name: 闪电喷射 Lightning Spray
Lightning Spray.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}能够产生并释放强力的电流放电。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to produce and expel powerful voltaic discharge.

lightningSpray.name: 闪电喷射 Lightning Spray
lightningSpray.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}喷吐出一道30英尺长、4英尺宽的闪电射线，攻击沿途每个目标的反射，并造成电击伤害。

若严重命中，此次攻击会施加@Condition[shocked]状态，持续3回合。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} expels a bolt of lighting in a 30 foot ray that is 4 feet wide, attacking the Reflex of each target along that path and dealing Electricity damage.

On a Critical Hit the attack causes the @Condition[shocked] condition for 3 Turns.

Magical Sight.name: 魔法视觉 Magical Sight
Magical Sight.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}拥有异界视界，使其对危险或机遇格外察觉。它在任何察觉检定上获得+2恩惠，并且能够看见@Condition[invisible]的生物。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has otherworldly sight that makes it especially aware of dangers or opportunities. It gains +2 Boons to any Awareness check and can see @Condition[invisible] creatures.

Multiply.name: 增殖 Multiply
Multiply.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{软泥怪}迅速成长，生命值和体型随之增加。

The @ref[actor.name]{ooze} grows rapidly, increasing in health and size.

oozeMultiply.name: 增殖 Multiply
oozeMultiply.description:
这只软泥怪的细胞随着生物的成长而迅速增殖。它的体型增加1，且其生命值提高等同于其坚韧数值的数量。

The ooze's cells rapidly multiply as the creature grows. Its Size increases by 1 and its Health increases by its Toughness value.

Necrotic Bite.name: 死灵之咬 Necrotic Bite
Necrotic Bite.description:
@ref[actor.name]{生物}用被疫病与亡灵腐化的巨口撕裂血肉。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} tears into flesh with a maw that is corrupted by pestilence and undeath.

necroticBite.name: 死灵之咬 Necrotic Bite
necroticBite.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}用带有疫病之咬的攻击发动攻击，该攻击被强化并造成腐化伤害。

在大成功时，此次攻击会造成@Condition[decaying]状态，持续3 回合。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks with a pestilent bite that is Empowered and deals Corruption damage.

On a Critical Success the attack causes the @Condition[decaying] condition for 3 Turns.

Noxious Spit.name: 剧毒唾液 Noxious Spit
Noxious Spit.description:
@ref[actor.name]{生物}会分泌一种唾液毒素，并能将其以喷射出的液滴形式吐出。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} produces a salivary toxin that it can expel in a projected globule.

noxiousSpit.name: 剧毒唾液 Noxious Spit
noxiousSpit.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}向20英尺内的一个目标生物吐出一团毒素，攻击其反射并造成毒素伤害。

在暴击时，此攻击会施加@Condition[poisoned]状态，持续3回合。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} spits globule of toxin at a target creature within 20 feet, attacking its Reflex and dealing Poison damage.

On a Critical Hit the attack causes the @Condition[poisoned] condition for 3 Turns.

Noxious Spray.name: 剧毒喷雾 Noxious Spray
Noxious Spray.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}能够产生并喷出有毒排泄物，形成一道投射射线。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to produce and expel toxic discharge in a projected ray.

noxiousSpray.name: 剧毒喷雾 Noxious Spray
noxiousSpray.description:
@ref[actor.name]{生物}喷射出一股有毒排放物，形成一道30英尺长、4英尺宽的射线，攻击该路径上每个目标的反射，并造成毒素伤害。

在严重命中时，此次攻击会造成@Condition[poisoned]状态，持续3 回合。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} expels toxic discharge in a 30 foot ray that is 4 feet wide, attacking the Reflex of each target along that path and dealing Poison damage.

On a Critical Hit the attack causes the @Condition[poisoned] condition for 3 Turns.

Pack Hunter.name: 群猎者 Pack Hunter
Pack Hunter.description:
这种生物是群猎者，会依靠其盟友夹击并骚扰目标，使其暴露于进一步的伤害之下。

该生物在攻击被夹击的敌人时，获得的恩惠数量翻倍。

This creature is a pack hunter, relying on its allies to flank and harrass a target to render it exposed to further harm.

This creature doubles number of Boons awarded from attacking a Flanked enemy.

Pouncing Strike.name: 猛扑打击 Pouncing Strike
Pouncing Strike.description:
这个生物向前突进，将其整个重量都倾注于一次跃起的打击之中。

This creature lunges forward, putting its whole weight behind a leaping strike.

pouncingStrike.name: 猛扑打击 Pouncing Strike
pouncingStrike.description:
此次攻击可在一次移动后使用，前提是该生物因这次移动而至少接近其目标10英尺。若该生物原本位于目标上方，则此次攻击在该次移动中每下降10英尺高度，便获得+1 恩惠。

若此次攻击为暴击，则该攻击的目标会立即陷入@Condition[prone]。

This attack may be used after a Move that brings the @ref[actor.name]{creature} at least 10 feet closer to its target. If the creature was above the target, this attack gains +1 Boon per 10 feet of elevation decrease in that movement.

If this attack is a Critical Hit, the target of the attack is immediately knocked @Condition[prone].

Psychic Absorption.name: 灵能吸收 Psychic Absorption
Psychic Absorption.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}对于针对其心智的攻击有着异常顽强的抵抗力。其灵能抗性加倍，且如果该抗性会将伤害量降至零以下，则负数值改为作为治疗承受。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is exceptionally unyielding to attacks on its mind. Its Psychic resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Radiant Absorption.name: 辉光吸收 Radiant Absorption
Radiant Absorption.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}对混沌的光之力量并不陌生。它的辉耀抗性加倍，且如果该抗性会将伤害量降低至零以下，则该负数值改为作为治疗承受。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is no stranger to the chaotic force of light. Its Radiant resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Radiant Death Burst.name: 耀辉死亡爆发 Radiant Death Burst
Radiant Death Burst.description:
当该@ref[actor.name]{生物}死亡时，它会在一次不稳定的爆发中炸裂，释放出耀眼的能量。

When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} dies, it explodes in a volatile burst of radiant energy.

radiantDeathBurst.name: 耀辉死亡爆发 Radiant Death Burst
radiantDeathBurst.description:
当 @ref[actor.name]{生物}陷入@Condition[dead]时，它会爆炸，释放出一阵光辉能量，对所有未能抵抗该效果的附近生物的坚韧防御发动攻击。

When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} becomes @Condition[dead], it explodes in a pulse of Radiant energy which attacks the Fortitude defense of all nearby creatures that fail to resist the effect.
radiantDeathBurst.condition:
该生物变为死亡。
The creature becomes Dead.

Raking Talons.name: 耙掠利爪 Raking Talons
Raking Talons.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}用其利爪迅速攻击，对单一目标造成多次抓击。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks rapidly with its talons, dealing multiple raking blows against a single target.

rakingTalons.name: 耙掠利爪 Raking Talons
rakingTalons.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}迅速地用双爪发起攻击。

如果至少有一次攻击获得严重成功，则其会施加@Condition[bleeding]状态，持续2 轮。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks swiftly with both talons.

If at least one attack results in a Critical Success, it inflicts the @Condition[bleeding] condition for 2 Rounds.

Repugnant Pustules.name: 令人作呕的脓疱 Repugnant Pustules
Repugnant Pustules.description:
一团恶臭的云雾如同裹尸布般笼罩着这个生物，那股刺鼻的有毒气味只可能来自正在发生的腐败。攻击这个生物很可能会释放出令人作呕且会造成腐化的精华。

A malodorous cloud hangs about this creature like a pall, the rank noxious scent that can only come from active decay. Striking this creature is likely to release repugnant and corrupting essence.

repugnantPustules.name: 令人作呕的脓疱 Repugnant Pustules
repugnantPustules.description:
当@ref[actor.name]{生物}被一次打击命中时，它可以部分爆裂，释放出一阵令人作呕的液体喷雾，造成腐化伤害。该动作随坚韧而成长，并以3英尺内任意生物的反射防御为目标。

在大成功时，受影响的目标会暂时处于@Condition[diseased]状态，持续3轮。

When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is hit by a Strike, it may partially burst to release a spray of sickening fluid that deals Corruption damage. This action scales with Toughness and targets the Reflex defense of any creature within 3 feet.

On a Critical Success, the affected target becomes temporarily @Condition[diseased] for 3 Rounds.

effects.name: 令人作呕的脓疱 Repugnant Pustules

Restless Dead.name: 躁动亡者 Restless Dead
Restless Dead.description:
@ref[actor.name]{该生物}的生命由死灵魔法或异界力量维系。当其本应被视为@Condition[dead]时，改为视为@Condition[incapacitated]。

在战斗结束后，@ref[actor.name]{该生物}可以开始执行“恢复”动作，并在恢复完成后重新获得意识。以这种方式进行的恢复可通过以下任一方式被阻止：

  • 该生物因其处于易伤的某种伤害类型而失能。

  • 使其作为不死生物复起的魔法力量被干扰、反制，或以其他方式驱散。

  • 该生物的身体被摧毁到无法再维持其物理形态的程度。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature}'s life is sustained by necromantic magic or otherworldly forces. When it would be considered @Condition[dead] it is instead @Condition[incapacitated].

After the conclusion of combat, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} may begin to perform the Recover action, regaining consciousness after the recovery is complete. Recovery in this fashion may be prevented in one of the following ways:

  • The creature was incapacitated by a type of damage for which it is Vulnerable.

  • The magical forces which caused it to rise as undead are disrupted, countered, or otherwise dispelled.

  • The creature's body is destroyed to a degree that it can no longer maintain its physical form.

Restraining Chomp.name: 束缚啃咬 Restraining Chomp
Restraining Chomp.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}用它强有力的下颚啃咬并咬住目标，来一次强力的猛咬。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} uses its powerful jaws to bite and hold a target with a powerful chomp.

restrainingChomp.name: 束缚啃咬 Restraining Chomp
restrainingChomp.description:
该生物一口咬住其目标。若此次攻击成功，且目标的体型等于或小于该生物，则目标还会陷入受拘束状态，直到该生物选择将其释放，或该拘束以其他方式被打破。在任意时刻，此动作只能拘束一个目标。

The creature chomps down upon its target. If the attack is successful and the target is equal or lesser in Size, the target is also Restrained until this creature chooses to release it or the restraint is otherwise broken. Only one target may be restrained by this action at a given time.

Sacrifice Self.name: 牺牲自我 Sacrifice Self
Sacrifice Self.description:
@ref[actor.name]{该生物}可以进行干预，代替相邻的盟友承受一次攻击。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} may intervene to take a blow instead of an adjacent ally.

sacrificeSelf.name: 牺牲自我 Sacrifice Self
sacrificeSelf.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}作出反应，进行一次不超过其步幅 的移动，使自己介入附近一名盟友与其能够察觉的某个伤害来源之间。

该@ref[actor.name]{生物}变为@Condition[dead]，并在牺牲中被摧毁，但触发该反应的动作不会对其原本的目标造成任何效果。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} reacts, performing a Movement up to their Stride to interpose itself between a nearby ally and some source of harm which it can perceive.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} becomes @Condition[dead], destroyed in their sacrifice, but the triggering action causes no effects to its original target.
sacrificeSelf.condition:
附近的一名盟友成为敌对动作的目标。
A nearby ally is targeted by a hostile action.

Self-Repair.name: 自我修复 Self-Repair
Self-Repair.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{构装体}启动内部修复机制，以减轻其所受的伤害。

The @ref[actor.name]{construct} activates internal repairing mechanisms to mitigate damage it has taken.

selfRepair.name: 自我修复 Self-Repair
selfRepair.description:
该构装体恢复等同于其韧性值的生命值，并立即结束一个当前正影响其自身、由其选择的状态。

The construct recovers its Toughness value in Health and immediately ends a single status condition of its choice that is currently affecting it.

Servitor.name: 仆从 Servitor
Servitor.description:
@ref[actor.name]{生物}服从他人的意志，并与其主人保持连接，使仆从与其控制者之间能够传递讯息，甚至共享感知。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} serves the will of another and maintains a connection to that master that allows the transmission or messages or even the sharing of senses between the servitor and its controller.

servitorSending.name: 仆役传讯 Servitor Sending
servitorSending.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}可以联系其主人，发送无声的沟通；只要另一生物能够接收讯息，其控制者便会立即收到。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can contact its master, sending inaudible communication which is instantaneously received by its controller as long as that other creature is capable of receiving messages.

Shadow Gait.name: 暗影步法 Shadow Gait
Shadow Gait.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}能够踏入并脱离阴影本身，以噩梦般且难以预测的方式移动。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to step into and out of shadow itself to move in nightmarish and unpredictable ways.

shadowGait.name: 暗影步法 Shadow Gait
shadowGait.description:
当处于微光或黑暗中时，@ref[actor.name]可以融入阴影，从视野中消失。它可以移动，并在另一个同样处于微光或黑暗的区域内重新出现。这是一种Displace移动，不会引发脱离接战。

While in dim light or darkness, the @ref[actor.name] can meld into shadow to disappear from view. It may Move and reappear within a different area which is also dim light or darkness. This is a Displace movement which provokes no disengagement.

Slippery Form.name: 滑溜形态 Slippery Form
Slippery Form.description:
该生物始终滑不留手，使其能够逃脱物理束缚的擒拿。

This creature is permanently slippery, giving it the ability to elude capture by physical restraints.

slipperyEscape.name: 滑溜脱逃 Slippery Escape
slipperyEscape.description:
该生物利用其滑溜形态挣脱束缚，立即结束受拘束状态。

The creature uses it slippery form to escape restraints, immediately ending the Restrained condition.

Subdivide.name: 细分 Subdivide
Subdivide.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{软泥怪}可以将自己分裂成多个部分，每个部分都是原体的独立复制体。

The @ref[actor.name]{ooze} can divide itself into multiple parts, each an independent copy of the original.

oozeSubdivide.name: 细分 Subdivide
oozeSubdivide.description:
软泥怪的细胞迅速分裂，这个生物一分为二！原本的生物与其复制体平分其剩余的生命值。每个结果生物的体型减少 1。

如果处于战斗中，新生物作为一个召唤物行动，并以先攻 1 加入。此动作仅可在该生物的体型大于 2 时使用。被创造出的软泥怪的等级绝不会高于普通。

The ooze's cells rapidly divide and the creature splits in two! The original creature and its clone equally divide its remaining Health. The Size of each resulting creature is decreased by 1.

If in combat, the new creature acts as a Summon and joins at Initiative 1. This Action may only be used if the creature has Size larger than 2. The created ooze never has rank superior to Normal.

Sunlight Weakness.name: 阳光弱点 Sunlight Weakness
Sunlight Weakness.description:
当处于阳光下时，@ref[actor.name]{生物} 的所有动作承受2 个祸骰。

此机制通过一个可在适用时轻松切换的Active Effect来处理。

While in sunlight, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} suffers 2 Banes to all actions.

This mechanic is handled through an Active Effect that is easily toggled when applicable.

Swooping Strike.name: 俯冲打击 Swooping Strike
Swooping Strike.description:
这个@ref[actor.name]{生物}从高空猛扑而下，发动俯冲攻击。

This @ref[actor.name]{creature} swoops from high above into a diving attack.

swoopingStrike.name: 俯冲打击 Swooping Strike
swoopingStrike.description:
此次攻击可在一次朝向目标下降了至少10英尺的移动后使用。该攻击在此次移动中每下降10英尺高度，便获得+1 恩惠。

如果此次攻击为暴击，则该攻击的目标立即被击倒至@Condition[prone]。

This attack may be used after a Move which descended at least 10 feet towards the target. The attack gains +1 Boon per 10 feet of elevation decrease in that movement.

If this attack is a Critical Hit, the target of the attack is immediately knocked @Condition[prone].

Tail Sweep.name: 扫尾 Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}可以用其沉重的尾巴横扫战场，力道骇人。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can whip its heavy tail across the battlefield with terrible force.

tailSweep.name: 扫尾 Tail Sweep
tailSweep.description:
@ref[actor.name]{生物}用其沉重的尾巴横扫出一道圆弧，击中范围内的所有生物。若造成暴击，受影响的目标会陷入 @Condition[staggered] 状态，直到其下个回合结束。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} sweeps its heavy tail in a circular arc, striking all creatures within range. On a Critical Hit, affected targets become @Condition[staggered] for until the end of their next turn.

Thermal Vision.name: 热视觉 Thermal Vision
Thermal Vision.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}通过温度差异精确感知世界，使其能够定位60英尺内的温血生物或其他会散发热量的生物，只要它们未处于完全掩蔽之后，且你未目盲或失能。使用此热视觉探测到的生物，在需要你看见目标的动作中，视为可见。

The @ref[actor.name]{Creature} perceives the world through differences in temperature with precision, allowing it to locate creatures which are warm-blooded or otherwise emit heat up to 60 feet away as long as they are not behind total cover and you are not Blinded or Incapacitated. A creature detected using this Thermal Vision is treated as visible for the purposes of actions which require you to see your target.

Thrash.name: 猛击 Thrash
Thrash.description:
一旦@ref[actor.name]{生物}拘束住一名敌人，它就会猛烈地猛击，对被抓住的受害者造成可怕的打击。

Once the @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an enemy restrained, it will thrash violently dealing terrible blows to the grasped victim.

thrash.name: 猛击 Thrash
thrash.description:
该生物对其当前受拘束的目标造成致命伤害。

The creature deals Deadly damage to a target that it currently has Restrained.
thrash.condition:
目标被该生物受拘束。
The target is Restrained by this creature.

Trampling Charge.name: 践踏冲锋 Trampling Charge
Trampling Charge.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}利用其庞大的体型向前冲锋，践踏挡路的较小生物。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} uses its prodigious size to charge forward, trampling smaller creatures that stand in its way.

tramplingCharge.name: 践踏冲锋 Trampling Charge
tramplingCharge.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}向前移动，距离最多为其跨步的两倍，并攻击其路径上所有生物的反射防御。体型为该生物一半或更小的目标会被猛然撞开，并陷入@Condition[stunned]，直到其下个回合结束。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} moves forward up to twice its Stride, attacking the Reflex defense of all creatures in its path. Targets who are half the creature's size or smaller are @Condition[stunned] until the end of their next turn as they are slammed aside.

Tusk Charge.name: 獠牙冲锋 Tusk Charge
Tusk Charge.description:
野猪低下头，以狂乱的速度冲来，流着涎水的喉部下方突出了獠牙。
The Boar lowers its head and charges with frantic speed, it's tusks protruding from beneath a drooling gullet.

tuskCharge.name: 獠牙冲锋 Tusk Charge
tuskCharge.description:
沿直线冲锋，距离最长可达你的跨步，并对你遭遇的第一个生物进行一次打击。若成功，目标被击倒为倒地。

Charge in a direct line up to your Stride and make a Strike against the first creature you encounter. If successful, the target is knocked Prone.

Venomous Bite.name: 剧毒噬咬 Venomous Bite
Venomous Bite.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}通过其啃咬注入毒素。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} injects toxin with their bite.

venomousBite.name: 剧毒噬咬 Venomous Bite
venomousBite.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}进行攻击，并注入毒素；若成功，则会施加@Condition[poisoned]状态，持续6回合。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks, injects toxin which, if successful, inflicts the @Condition[poisoned] condition for 6 Turns.

Void Absorption.name: 虚空吸收 Void Absorption
Void Absorption.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}对有序的黑暗力量并不陌生。其虚空抗性加倍，且如果该抗性会将伤害数值降至零以下，则该负数值改为作为治疗受到。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is no stranger to the orderly force of darkness. Its Void resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Web Spinner.name: 织网者 Web Spinner
Web Spinner.description:
@ref[actor.name]{生物}能够制造出黏性极强的蛛网。它无视任何由蛛网造成的移动限制或束缚。

当与一张蛛网接触时，@ref[actor.name]{生物}会知晓任何其他与同一张蛛网接触的生物的精确位置。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can create powerfully adhesive webbing. It ignores any movement restrictions or restraints otherwise caused by webbing.

While in contact with a web, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} knows the precise location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

webSpinner.name: 织网者 Web Spinner
webSpinner.description:
该生物可以花费10分钟纺出一段新的蛛网，覆盖一个5英尺的区域。

The creature can spend 10 minutes to spin a new new section of webbing that covers a 5-foot area.
